name: Virtual Greens Golf Lounge
address: 13006 S Farm to Market Rd 730, Azle, TX 76020
about: Virtual Greens Golf Lounge is a virtual golf simulator venue located in Azle, TX. It offers full-service food and beverage options alongside its golf simulation bays. The venue provides various membership levels and walk-in pricing for bay access. It is designed as a social and recreational space for golfers of all skill levels to enjoy virtual golf in a relaxed atmosphere. The facility operates daily from 9 AM to 10 PM and includes amenities like a full bar with mixed drinks, draft beer, seltzers, and wine. Membership options range from annual packages to monthly business sponsorships, each offering different levels of bay access and food and beverage discounts.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service bar and food options complement the virtual golf experience
Flexible membership levels for different usage needs and budgets
Convenient walk-in pricing for short sessions
Prime location in Azle with easy accessibility

food_and_drink.notes: Delicious food items available, perfect complement to virtual golf experience
Full-service bar including mixed drinks, draft beer, seltzers, and wine

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and food menu available on-site, with no mention of outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The typical time for an 18-hole virtual golf session can vary but generally takes about 1-2 hours depending on simulator speed and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Virtual Greens Golf Lounge appears to be family-friendly with walk-in options and a casual sports bar atmosphere.
